NPC_DIALOGUE.WarningNoToken: You must select a Token to perform the check.
NPC_DIALOGUE.PageNotFound: The page was not found in the Journal
NPC_DIALOGUE.Settings.TypewriterHint: If checked, NPC text will appear gradually letter by letter, simulating an RPG video game style.
NPC_DIALOGUE.Settings.SpeedHint: The delay in milliseconds between each typed character. Lower numbers make typing faster (Default: 25).
NPC_DIALOGUE.Settings.KeyHint: The key the player will press while hovering or targeting an NPC to start the dialogue (use lowercase, e.g., t, e, f, q).
NPC_DIALOGUE.Settings.DistHint: The grid square limit allowed for a player to be able to initiate a conversation with an NPC.
